content:
```Cargo.toml
[package]
name = "gce-vm"
version = "1.0.7"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["Rodolfo Villaruz <rodolfo@yes.ph>"]
description = "A small command-line tool for managing a single Google Compute Engine VM you use as a development or work machine."
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/rodolfovillaruz/gvm"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["cli", "tool"]
categories = ["command-line-utilities"]
exclude = [
    ".dump/*"
]

[[bin]]
name = "gvm"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
tokio       = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
clap        = { version = "4", features = ["derive", "env"] }
anyhow      = "1"
thiserror   = "2"
reqwest     = { version = "0.13", features = ["json", "rustls"] }
serde       = { version = "1",    features = ["derive"] }
serde_json  = "1"
gcp_auth    = "0.12"
colored     = "3"
google-cloud-auth = "1.9.0"
google-cloud-compute-v1 = "2.4.0"
google-cloud-gax = "1.9.1"

```

```.github/workflows/release.yaml
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+"

permissions:
  contents: write   # needed to create GitHub Releases & upload assets

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
  BINARY_NAME: gvm

jobs:
  # ── Validate the tag matches Cargo.toml version ─────────────────────────────
  validate:
    name: Validate version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Extract Cargo.toml version
        id: cargo_version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(grep '^version' Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/.*= *"\(.*\)"/\1/')
          echo "version=v${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Compare tag vs Cargo.toml
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          CARGO="${{ steps.cargo_version.outputs.version }}"
          if [[ "$TAG" != "$CARGO" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Git tag ($TAG) does not match Cargo.toml version ($CARGO)"
            exit 1
          fi

  # ── Build static binaries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  build:
    name: Build — ${{ matrix.target }}
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          # Static x86-64 (musl)
          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: false
            archive_suffix: linux-amd64

          # Static ARM64 (musl, cross-compiled)
          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: true
            archive_suffix: linux-arm64

          # GNU x86-64 (wider glibc compatibility)
          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: false
            archive_suffix: linux-amd64-gnu

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      # ── Toolchain ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install stable toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}

      # ── musl libc for native builds ──────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install musl-tools (x86_64-musl)
        if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools ca-certificates

      # ── Cross for cross-compiled targets ─────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install cross
        if: matrix.cross == true
        run: cargo install cross --locked

      # ── Cache ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Cache cargo registry & build artefacts
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry
            ~/.cargo/git
            target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-

      # ── Compile ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Build (cargo)
        if: matrix.cross == false
        run: cargo build --release --locked --target ${{ matrix.target }}

      - name: Build (cross)
        if: matrix.cross == true
        run: cross build --release --locked --target ${{ matrix.target }}

      # ── Package ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Create release archive
        id: package
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          ARCHIVE="${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${TAG}-${{ matrix.archive_suffix }}.tar.gz"
          BINARY="target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}"

          # Create staging directory with files
          mkdir -p staging
          cp "$BINARY" staging/
          cp README.md staging/

          # Create archive from staging
          tar -czf "$ARCHIVE" -C staging .
          rm -rf staging

          echo "archive=${ARCHIVE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate SHA-256 checksum
        run: |
          sha256sum "${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}" \
            > "${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}.sha256"

      # ── Upload artefacts for the next job ────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Upload artefacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: release-${{ matrix.target }}
          path: |
            ${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}
            ${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}.sha256
          retention-days: 1

  # ── Publish to crates.io ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  publish:
    name: Publish to crates.io
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: crates-io   # optional: add a protected environment for approval
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Install stable toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Publish
        env:
          CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
        run: cargo publish --locked

  # ── Create GitHub Release ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  github-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Download all release artefacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
        with:
          pattern: release-*
          merge-multiple: true
          path: dist/

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          cat <<EOF > release-notes.md
          ### Installation

          #### via \`cargo install\`
          \`\`\`bash
          cargo install gvm --locked
          \`\`\`

          #### Pre-built binary (Linux)
          \`\`\`bash
          # x86-64 (static, musl)
          curl -fsSL https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/${TAG}/gvm-${TAG}-linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz
          sudo mv gvm /usr/local/bin/

          # ARM64 (static, musl)
          curl -fsSL https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/${TAG}/gvm-${TAG}-linux-arm64.tar.gz | tar -xz
          sudo mv gvm /usr/local/bin/
          \`\`\`

          ### Checksums
          \`\`\`
          $(cat dist/*.sha256)
          \`\`\`
          EOF

      - name: Publish GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v3
        with:
          name: "gvm ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          body_path: release-notes.md
          files: dist/*
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true

```

- Add a windows binary release

## Changes

Three things need to be handled for Windows:
1. **Binary extension** — the built artifact is `gvm.exe`
2. **Archive format** — `.zip` instead of `.tar.gz` (Windows convention; `7z` is pre-installed on the runner)
3. **Single `id: package` step** — kept by branching on `$RUNNER_OS` inside one bash script so downstream steps (`sha256sum`, upload) need no changes

```.github/workflows/release.yaml
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+"

permissions:
  contents: write

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
  BINARY_NAME: gvm

jobs:
  # ── Validate the tag matches Cargo.toml version ─────────────────────────────
  validate:
    name: Validate version
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Extract Cargo.toml version
        id: cargo_version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(grep '^version' Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/.*= *"\(.*\)"/\1/')
          echo "version=v${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Compare tag vs Cargo.toml
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          CARGO="${{ steps.cargo_version.outputs.version }}"
          if [[ "$TAG" != "$CARGO" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Git tag ($TAG) does not match Cargo.toml version ($CARGO)"
            exit 1
          fi

  # ── Build static binaries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  build:
    name: Build — ${{ matrix.target }}
    needs: validate
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          # Static x86-64 (musl)
          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: false
            archive_suffix: linux-amd64

          # Static ARM64 (musl, cross-compiled)
          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: true
            archive_suffix: linux-arm64

          # GNU x86-64 (wider glibc compatibility)
          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
            os: ubuntu-latest
            cross: false
            archive_suffix: linux-amd64-gnu

          # Windows x86-64 (MSVC)
          - target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
            os: windows-latest
            cross: false
            archive_suffix: windows-amd64

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      # ── Toolchain ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install stable toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}

      # ── musl libc for native builds ──────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install musl-tools (x86_64-musl)
        if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools ca-certificates

      # ── Cross for cross-compiled targets ─────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Install cross
        if: matrix.cross == true
        run: cargo install cross --locked

      # ── Cache ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Cache cargo registry & build artefacts
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry
            ~/.cargo/git
            target
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-

      # ── Compile ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Build (cargo)
        if: matrix.cross == false
        run: cargo build --release --locked --target ${{ matrix.target }}

      - name: Build (cross)
        if: matrix.cross == true
        run: cross build --release --locked --target ${{ matrix.target }}

      # ── Package ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      # Uses bash on all platforms (Git Bash on Windows).
      # Windows  → .zip  via 7z  (pre-installed on windows-latest)
      # Linux    → .tar.gz via tar
      - name: Create release archive
        id: package
        shell: bash
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"

          if [[ "$RUNNER_OS" == "Windows" ]]; then
            BINARY="target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}.exe"
            ARCHIVE="${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${TAG}-${{ matrix.archive_suffix }}.zip"
            mkdir staging
            cp "$BINARY" staging/
            cp README.md staging/
            7z a "$ARCHIVE" ./staging/*
          else
            BINARY="target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}"
            ARCHIVE="${{ env.BINARY_NAME }}-${TAG}-${{ matrix.archive_suffix }}.tar.gz"
            mkdir -p staging
            cp "$BINARY" staging/
            cp README.md staging/
            tar -czf "$ARCHIVE" -C staging .
          fi

          rm -rf staging
          echo "archive=${ARCHIVE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate SHA-256 checksum
        shell: bash
        run: |
          sha256sum "${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}" \
            > "${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}.sha256"

      # ── Upload artefacts for the next job ────────────────────────────────────
      - name: Upload artefacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: release-${{ matrix.target }}
          path: |
            ${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}
            ${{ steps.package.outputs.archive }}.sha256
          retention-days: 1

  # ── Publish to crates.io ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  publish:
    name: Publish to crates.io
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: crates-io
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Install stable toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Publish
        env:
          CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
        run: cargo publish --locked

  # ── Create GitHub Release ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  github-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Download all release artefacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
        with:
          pattern: release-*
          merge-multiple: true
          path: dist/

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        run: |
          TAG="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          cat <<EOF > release-notes.md
          ### Installation

          #### via \`cargo install\`
          \`\`\`bash
          cargo install gvm --locked
          \`\`\`

          #### Pre-built binary (Linux)
          \`\`\`bash
          # x86-64 (static, musl)
          curl -fsSL https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/${TAG}/gvm-${TAG}-linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz
          sudo mv gvm /usr/local/bin/

          # ARM64 (static, musl)
          curl -fsSL https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/${TAG}/gvm-${TAG}-linux-arm64.tar.gz | tar -xz
          sudo mv gvm /usr/local/bin/
          \`\`\`

          #### Pre-built binary (Windows)
          \`\`\`powershell
          # x86-64
          Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/${TAG}/gvm-${TAG}-windows-amd64.zip -OutFile gvm.zip
          Expand-Archive gvm.zip -DestinationPath .
          \`\`\`

          ### Checksums
          \`\`\`
          $(cat dist/*.sha256)
          \`\`\`
          EOF

      - name: Publish GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v3
        with:
          name: "gvm ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          body_path: release-notes.md
          files: dist/*
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
```

### Summary of changes

| Location | What changed |
|---|---|
| `matrix.include` | Added `x86_64-pc-windows-msvc` entry with `os: windows-latest` |
| `Create release archive` step | Added `shell: bash` and an `if/else` on `$RUNNER_OS`: Windows gets `.exe` + `7z` → `.zip`; Linux keeps `tar` → `.tar.gz` |
| `Generate SHA-256 checksum` step | Added `shell: bash` so `sha256sum` resolves via Git Bash on Windows |
| Release notes | Added a PowerShell install snippet for the Windows asset |
